Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: accessories by location above the waist [300211602], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: shirts (main garments) [300212499], main garments for the upper body [300209278], main garments [300209263], clothing [300266639], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Separate or detachable shirt fronts, often with a collar, worn under another garment.
Camisa separada o desmontable, frecuentemente con un cuello, utilizada debajo de otra prenda
Aparte of afneembare voorstukken van hemden die meestal een kraag hebben en onder een ander kledingstuk worden gedragen.
Separates oder abnehmbares Vorderteil eines Hemdes, oft mit einem Kragen, das unter einem anderen Kleidungsstück getragen wird.
